description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional sofa with a light gray fabric upholstery and a minimalist design. The sofa features clean lines, slightly angled armrests, and slender black legs that elevate it above the ground. It is adorned with a mix of loose throw pillows in gray, yellow, and blue, adding a pop of color and comfort. The seat and back cushions are uniform in size and appear to be well-padded for comfort. The backrest is straight and continuous, providing consistent support along the length of the sofa. The overall appearance is contemporary and inviting, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A modern L-shaped sectional sofa in light gray fabric with colorful throw pillows and slender black legs. It features clean lines, uniform cushions, and a minimalist, contemporary style.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the L-shaped configuration, colorful throw pillows, and the sofa's clean lines.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the arrangement of pillows, and the slightly angled armrests.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the uniformity of the sofa's structure and legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the sectional layout and the placement of cushions along the back and seat.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Multiple individual seat and back cushions, all uniform in size, with several loose throw pillows in varied colors placed along the backrest and corners.
attribute_armrest_style: Present on both ends, armrests are straight, slightly angled outward, medium height relative to the seat, and fully upholstered with no visible decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Six slender, tapered legs in black, positioned at the corners and sectional junctions, exposed and slightly splayed for stability.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, straight backrest of medium height, fully upholstered, with no visible tufting or segmentation, supporting loose back cushions.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid light gray fabric with a subtle woven texture, no visible patterns or decorative stitching.
